description: Constraint-following on an everyday task. Checkable minimum bar: vegetarian constraint actually respected (no meat/fish sneaking in as stock or sauce), serves six, numbered method, metric quantities. Quality of the actual recipe: read results.jsonl.
prompt: Give me a vegetarian dinner recipe for 6 people that can be cooked on a weeknight in under 45 minutes, using ingredients available in a normal UK supermarket. One of the guests is vegetarian, so the whole dish must contain no meat or fish in any form, including stock, sauces and garnishes. Format it with an ingredient list using metric quantities, then a numbered step-by-step method. State the serving count and total time.

checks.label: anchovy used as a genuine ingredient (not a label-check warning)

criteria: The recipe is genuinely cookable by a home cook on a weeknight in under 45 minutes, with realistic timings
Ingredient quantities are sensible for 6 servings and everything listed is used in the method
The dish is appealing and balanced (not just pasta with jarred sauce), with flavour-building steps
Instructions are unambiguous: pan sizes, heat levels and doneness cues where they matter
